description: Sent to the submitter as a confirmation when their SaaS product idea is received
subject: [G42 SaaS Factory] Thank You — Your Idea Has Been Received
body:
Thank You for Your Submission

Dear {{submitter_name}},

Thank you for submitting your idea "{{idea_name}}" to the G42 SaaS Factory Board. Your submission has been received and is now in the Ideate stage of our evaluation process.

What happens next?

Our team will review your idea and get back to you within 7 business days with an initial assessment and next steps.

Idea{{idea_name}}
Business Unit{{business_unit}}
Vertical{{vertical}}

If you have any questions in the meantime, please reach out to the SaaS Factory team.

Best regards,
G42 SaaS Factory Team

This is an automated confirmation. You are receiving this because you submitted an idea to the G42 SaaS Factory Board.
